headline: Are LEG, AVNS, MKC Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders?

headline: Primark Will Become a Stand-alone Retail Company Following Its Separation From ABF in 2027
summary: The board of Associated British Foods has confirmed plans to split its foods and fashion businesses, although both will remain publicly listed and majority owned by the Weston family's Wittington Investments.

raw.headline: Primark Will Become a Stand-alone Retail Company Following Its Separation From ABF in 2027
raw.summary: The board of Associated British Foods has confirmed plans to split its foods and fashion businesses, although both will remain publicly listed and majority owned by the Weston family's Wittington Investments.

headline: A Little Pressure Helped Pepsi. Can the Rest of the Food Industry Follow?
summary: PepsiCo is defying the odds in a brutal environment, but its path isn’t easy to replicate.
